objective: Replace the inbound/Loop pullquote with a verified factual HubSpot highlight that supports Loop Marketing as an AI-era operating model, without changing the published post.

operations.currentText: Según HubSpot, el 82 % de los líderes de marketing reconocen que sus equipos pierden agilidad porque dependen de reportes trimestrales y campañas pesadas, en lugar de operar en cic...
operations.proposedText: Según HubSpot, el 61 % de los marketers cree que el marketing vive su mayor disrupción en 20 años por la IA; el Loop convierte esa presión en ciclos cortos de aprendizaje, no en campañas más pesadas (HubSpot, State of Marketing 2026).
operations.rationale: Use a verified HubSpot factual highlight that supports the article's argument that Loop Marketing adds AI-era agility on top of inbound.
guardrails: Match both path and fingerprint before applying a future patch.
Patch a draft/private clone first; never patch the published source directly.
Apply only to a draft/private clone after revalidating the source fingerprint.
Never patch the published source object from this plan.

nextStep.notes: The next command should create or prepare a draft/private clone plan. It is intentionally not implemented in this plan-only slice.

rollback.notes: This patch plan is a local artifact only. It performs no WordPress mutation, so rollback is deleting the artifact.
